case_title: MICHAEL WALLIS VS. STELLAR RECOVERY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: BUSINESS FILINGS INCORPORATED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLIS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT STELLAR RECOVERY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-18-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALISON EMERY--COMPLIANCE COUNSEL. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
